task.title: Stream C: Dashboard provider SDK-only migration

events.content: Split relaycast-provider into orchestration + helpers + types modules: Split relaycast-provider into orchestration + helpers + types modules

raw.question: Split relaycast-provider into orchestration + helpers + types modules
raw.chosen: Split relaycast-provider into orchestration + helpers + types modules
raw.reasoning: Keeps provider file focused on SDK orchestration glue while preserving API compatibility and reducing migration risk

events.content: Use @agent-relay/contracts isBrokerIdentity for identity normalization: Use @agent-relay/contracts isBrokerIdentity for identity normalization

raw.question: Use @agent-relay/contracts isBrokerIdentity for identity normalization
raw.reasoning: Removes local broker identity regex heuristics and centralizes pattern semantics in shared contracts

retrospective.summary: Migrated dashboard relaycast provider to SDK-only orchestration, extracted helpers/types modules, integrated contracts identity helper, and validated dashboard-server tests/typecheck plus contracts compile/circular checks
